changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment: Make creation_dt/update_dt zone-aware (timestamp -> timestamptz) on words and dictionaries, so the API serializes ISO-8601 WITH offset and clients can resolve the absolute instant. Existing naked values are interpreted as UTC (dev data is throwaway; no prod data yet).

sql.sql: ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN creation_dt TYPE timestamptz USING creation_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamptz USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE dictionaries ALTER COLUMN creation_dt TYPE timestamptz USING creation_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE dictionaries ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamptz USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';

ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN creation_dt TYPE timestamp USING creation_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE words ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamp USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE dictionaries ALTER COLUMN creation_dt TYPE timestamp USING creation_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'; ALTER TABLE dictionaries ALTER COLUMN update_dt TYPE timestamp USING update_dt AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
